name: Second-Hand Showdown with Vicky Pattison
overview: Vicky Pattison helps guests to find a bold new style using only pre-loved fashion. Two stylists pull together the looks, but only one wardrobe will win. Who'll triumph in the second-hand showdown?

trailers.title: Drag King Stops Hiding and Leaves Vicky Pattison In Tears | Second-Hand Showdown | Channel 4
Emotional Fashion Makeover Helps Give Nurse Fresh Start | Second-Hand Showdown | Channel 4
